DescribeInstances.filters: Condition filters. See Appendix Filter. Multiple filters are combined with AND logic; multiple values within a filter are combined with OR logic. Supported fields: * name=instanceId, e.g. value=["rapidfs-wKEltVDfQwgO", "rapidfs-Lp1yaDO582fz"]; * name=instanceName, e.g. value=["filter-name", "test-name"]; * name=status, enum values refer to Appendix InstanceStatus, e.g. value=["RUNNING", "CREATING"]; * name=aihcResourcePoolId/cceClusterId/k8sControllerId, e.g. value=["aihc-hk25ilq7xcfd", "cce-gv45s2cp"]
DescribeInstances.filters.name: The field to filter on. Multiple filters are combined with AND logic. Example: zone
DescribeInstances.filters.values: Filter values for the field. Multiple values are combined with OR logic. Example: ["zoneA", "zoneB"]
DescribeInstances.maxKeys: Maximum number of instances to return. Valid range: [1, 1000]. Default: 100
DescribeInstances.marker: Starting position for paginated list queries. The returned list is sorted by instanceId in lexicographic order. Set to the nextMarker value returned by the previous request
